title: Reaching First Value in the New User Journey
summary: Explored where new users stall before reaching their first meaningful outcome. Most never connected their data, so the product looked empty and they left during the first session. Users who reached one real result in the first session returned at far higher rates.

quotes.text: I logged in, saw an empty screen, and didn't know what I was supposed to do next, so I left.
quotes.speaker: Participant 5, new user
